releaseNotes:
Context & Memory v1 and Workspace Code Tools release.

Highlights:
- Added token budget handling, automatic context compaction, and one-shot reactive retry when providers report context limits
- Added project memory files plus memory_read and memory_write tools for stable project facts and preferences
- Persisted large tool outputs into sandbox context artifacts so long runs do not overflow model context
- Added professional workspace code tools: read, grep, glob, edit, multi_edit, diff, apply_patch, rollback, and lsp_diagnostics
- Extended tool metadata and safety checks for read-only concurrency, write serialization, path boundaries, backups, and rollback-ready edits
- Added tests for context compaction, output persistence, project memory, and workspace code edits
